title: malus mandshurica var. genuina
intro: Malus mandshurica var. genuina, also known as the Korean Crabapple or Manchurian Crabapple, is a deciduous shrub or small tree belonging to the rose family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. It is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, sore throats, and digestive issues, due to its health benefits such as reducing inflammation and boosting the immune system. Malus mandshurica var. genuina is commonly prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal use, although specific herbal preparations may vary depending on the region and intended application.
